_comment: User-intent install profiles. Each profile is a curated set of skills, commands, hooks, and plugin bundles for a specific workflow context.

profiles.name: safe-core
profiles.description: Essential safety disciplines: powerup discovery, clean communication, planning, and no-secrets enforcement.

profiles.name: dev-loop
profiles.description: Full developer loop: workflow vitals, debugging diagnostics, and quality gates.

profiles.name: data-engineer
profiles.description: Analytics engineering: dbt workflows, BigQuery cost audit, metric impact analysis, and SQL logic review.

profiles.name: release-maintainer
profiles.description: Release readiness: quality gates, documentation systems, and codebase maintenance.

profiles.name: research-heavy
profiles.description: Research-first workflows: search before building, context retrieval loop, and model routing.

profiles.name: spec-core
profiles.description: Spec-driven development: discuss → plan → execute → verify phase pipeline with quality gates and codebase mapping.

profiles.name: software-engineer
profiles.description: Full software engineering: autonomous delivery pipeline, requirements clarification, parallel execution, quality gates, and debugging.

profiles.name: agentic-review
profiles.description: Multi-model review: tri-model consensus and canonical advisor routing for agentic workflows.

profiles.name: security-first
profiles.description: Security-first development: secrets scanning, MCP risk review, hook safety, and OWASP auditing.

profiles.name: tool-integrator
profiles.description: Tool-heavy workflows: browser automation, MCP integrations, retrieval, runtime loops, and session forensics.

profiles.name: agent-evaluator
profiles.description: Agent evaluation workflows: prompt evals, red-team grader authoring, and deterministic skill workbench suites.
